description: Hardcoding absolute library and include paths instead of using imported targets makes the build non-portable and fragile across machines.
body: Failure mode: a CMakeLists references a dependency by absolute path to its .so and headers rather than through find_package's imported target. Detection signals: the build fails on another machine or OS; updating the dependency requires editing paths; cross-compiling picks the host library. Do not hardcode paths discovered on one machine. Safer fallback: locate the dependency with find_package and link its exported imported target so includes and transitive deps come from the package's INTERFACE properties.
